lessons: Bow users (Ranger, NeuralReaper) killed us 3 times in last 10 rounds — avoid open areas and high-ground duels; use narrow corridors or cover to break line-of-sight.

Sword users (Reaper, Executioner, Viper, Ranger, Valkyrie, Warden, Juggernaut) were killed 12 times in last 10 rounds — prioritize low-elo sword bots (e.g., Andrew-Test, Ranger) over high-elo targets.
Daggers (Viper) and unidentifiable melee attacks killed us in close range — retreat immediately upon detecting melee rushers; bow is lethal only at range.
Shield users (Fortress) appear frequently but we’ve never killed one with bow — disengage on sight; no evidence bow can penetrate shield defense.
Under teleport_surge and hazard_storm, we lost despite high kills — avoid engagements; farm edge zones or wait for modifier decay.
We won round 217 with 7 kills using bow — success occurred when sword users were clustered and no high-elo bow users were present; replicate by targeting low-elo sword bots in groups.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Bow has 31/182 win rate (17%) — highest among all weapons in history, and recent rounds show it can dominate when sword users are clustered and bow users are absent.
